task_goal:
Add the following expenses into the pro expense:
name|amount_dollars|category_name|note
Subscriptions|$438.01|Others|A need
task_goal_rewrite: An expense entry with name 'Subscriptions', amount $438.01, category 'Others', and note 'A need' is present in the pro expense app.

checkpoints.description: The pro expense app contains an expense entry named 'Subscriptions'.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the 'Subscriptions' expense entry visible in the app's expense list or detail view.

checkpoints.description: The 'Subscriptions' expense entry displays an amount of $438.01.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the amount $438.01 associated with the 'Subscriptions' expense entry.

checkpoints.description: The 'Subscriptions' expense entry is assigned to the 'Others' category.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the 'Others' category label linked to the 'Subscriptions' expense entry.

checkpoints.description: The 'Subscriptions' expense entry includes the note text 'A need'.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the note 'A need' within the 'Subscriptions' expense entry's details.

success_rule: Success is achieved if all required checkpoints are satisfied: the expense entry exists in the pro expense app with all specified details (name, amount, category, note) exactly matching the goal values.
